_comment: Sweep queue for contrastive_inpainting_v1.scripts.orchestrate. 'base_args' are merged into every entry's 'args' (entry wins). JSON booleans: true -> bare flag (e.g. --casia_train), false -> flag omitted; lists -> repeated values after the flag; everything else -> --key value. The literal string {run_root} in any value is replaced with the absolute --run_root passed to the orchestrator. Entries that do not set 'checkpoint_root' get --checkpoint_root <run_root>/<name> injected automatically, so each run's checkpoints/logs land under their own subdir. Run: python -m contrastive_inpainting_v1.scripts.orchestrate --queue sweeps/example_queue.json --run_root /content/drive/MyDrive/runs/tau_sweep
